VII. The XXI Bomber Command 195

BOMB GROUP PLANE ROSTERS

This section is a group-by-group listing of planes known —_a subsection of names with known group assignments but un-
to have been assigned to the individual groups when the known serial numbers. That subsection lists by name more
groups were assigned to the XXI Bomber Command 1944-45. than 300 airplanes assigned to specific groups. Some redun-
The planes are identified by serial number only. dancy is certain to exist between those planes and the planes

In addition, the Names List earlier in the book includes listed below by serial number in the individual group rosters.
